Video.summary: Officer Hanson is kidnapped endangering his life, and that of a Hollywood heartthrob he was sent to protect.
Video.title: You Ought To Be In Prison

Image.alt: You Ought To Be In Prison
You Ought To Be In Prison
You Ought To Be In Prison

You Ought To Be In Prison
You Ought To Be In Prison
You Ought To Be In Prison
You Ought To Be In Prison
You Ought To Be In Prison

Video.summary: When a gymnast dies of a steroid overdose, Penhall and Hoffs go undercover to discover the source.
Video.title: How Much Is That Body In The Window?

Image.alt: How Much Is That Body In The Window?
How Much Is That Body In The Window?
How Much Is That Body In The Window?
How Much Is That Body In The Window?
How Much Is That Body In The Window?
How Much Is That Body In The Window?
How Much Is That Body In The Window?
How Much Is That Body In The Window?
How Much Is That Body In The Window?

Video.summary: Officer loki is faced with immediate dismissal from the Chapel when he's uncovered as a Vietnamese refugee.
Video.title: Christmas In Saigon

Video.summary: Officer Hanson experiences a late teenage rebellion, putting his friendships and his future in jeopardy.
Video.title: Fear And Loathing With Russell Buckins / Don't The Quarter Mile In A Lifetime

Image.alt: Fear And Loathing With Russell Buckins / Don't The Quarter Mile In A Lifetime
Fear And Loathing With Russell Buckins / Don't The Quarter Mile In A Lifetime
Fear And Loathing With Russell Buckins / Don't The Quarter Mile In A Lifetime

Fear And Loathing With Russell Buckins / Don't The Quarter Mile In A Lifetime
Fear And Loathing With Russell Buckins / Don't The Quarter Mile In A Lifetime

Video.summary: Frustratingly helpless in a case he can't solve, Hanson befriends a teen AIDS patient he is asked to protect.
Video.title: A Big Disease With A Little Name

Image.alt: A Big Disease With A Little Name
A Big Disease With A Little Name
A Big Disease With A Little Name
A Big Disease With A Little Name
A Big Disease With A Little Name
A Big Disease With A Little Name
A Big Disease With A Little Name
A Big Disease With A Little Name
A Big Disease With A Little Name

Video.summary: On Valentine's Day the Jump Street squad plays poker and reminisces about their worst dates.
Video.title: Chapel Of Love

Video.summary: Hanson's trapped in an adolescent abuse center when he goes to investigate reports of patient mistreatment.
Video.title: I'm OK, You Need Work

Video.summary: Hanson stalks a ruthless killer to avenge the cold-blooded murder of his girlfriend.
Video.title: Orpheus 3.3 / The Convenience Killer

Video.summary: Hanson and Penhall pose as battling brothers to infiltrate a gang of kids from the wrong side of the tracks.
Video.title: Champagne High

Video.summary: Hanson poses as a bible thumping student and befriends a teen whose strong faith almost costs him his life.
Video.title: Brother Hanson & The Miracle Of Renner's Pond

Image.alt: Brother Hanson & The Miracle Of Renner's Pond
Brother Hanson & The Miracle Of Renner's Pond
Brother Hanson & The Miracle Of Renner's Pond
Brother Hanson & The Miracle Of Renner's Pond
Brother Hanson & The Miracle Of Renner's Pond
Brother Hanson & The Miracle Of Renner's Pond
Brother Hanson & The Miracle Of Renner's Pond
Brother Hanson & The Miracle Of Renner's Pond
Brother Hanson & The Miracle Of Renner's Pond

Video.summary: The Jump Street gang may lose Judy Hoffs when she falls for a guy on the wrong side of the law.
Video.title: Raising Marijuana

Video.summary: Penhall recounts painful memories of his mother's suicide when a youth he's investigating takes his own life.
Video.title: Best Years Of Your Life

Video.summary: When a young murderer and his bride are busted at their wedding, a desperate groom takes Hoffs hostage.
Video.title: Cory And Dean Got Married

Video.summary: The Jump Street cops must find temporary jobs when school's out for summer, and maybe forever.
Video.title: School's Out

Video.summary: Hanson comes to blows with a new partner whom he suspects is as bigoted as the racists they're investigating.
Video.title: Fun With Animals

Video.summary: Hanson and Booker try to catch a drug dealer--impeded by vigilantes committed to clean the streets of crime.
Video.title: Slippin' Into Darkness / Date With An Angel

Image.alt: Slippin' Into Darkness / Date With An Angel
Slippin' Into Darkness / Date With An Angel
Slippin' Into Darkness / Date With An Angel
Slippin' Into Darkness / Date With An Angel
Slippin' Into Darkness / Date With An Angel
Slippin' Into Darkness / Date With An Angel
Slippin' Into Darkness / Date With An Angel
Slippin' Into Darkness / Date With An Angel
Slippin' Into Darkness / Date With An Angel

Video.summary: Penhall must help a falsely accused child molester overcome the devastation of the false charge.
Video.title: The Currency We Trade In

Video.summary: Penhall and Booker join an all-state football team to investigate negligence on the part of the coach.
Video.title: Coach Of The Year

Video.summary: The Jump Street team goes undercover to find out who has been vandalizing pregnancy clinics.
Video.title: Whose Choice Is It Anyways?

Video.summary: Jump Street goes undercover on a college campus to investigate a rape on fraternity row.
Video.title: Hell Week

Video.summary: loki infiltrates a gang and offered a chance to contact his grandma who was left in Vietnam after the war.
Video.title: The Dragon And The Angel

Video.summary: When the police union strikes, the Jump Street cops are torn over which side of the picket line to choose.
Video.title: Blu Flu

Video.summary: The Jump Street crew pose as inmates in juvenile lock-up to learn how heroin is entering the facility.
Video.title: Swallowed Alive

Video.summary: Hoffs learns her new lover is married and when she tries to break up, he sexually harasses her.
Video.title: What About Love?

Video.summary: While trying to infiltrate a high school computer club, Penhall is picked on by a bully.
Video.title: Woolly Bullies

Video.summary: When a revealing magazine article about the Jump Street program is written, Hanson is suspended.
Video.title: The Dreaded Return Of Russell Buckins

Image.alt: The Dreaded Return Of Russell Buckins
The Dreaded Return Of Russell Buckins
The Dreaded Return Of Russell Buckins
The Dreaded Return Of Russell Buckins
The Dreaded Return Of Russell Buckins
The Dreaded Return Of Russell Buckins
The Dreaded Return Of Russell Buckins
The Dreaded Return Of Russell Buckins
The Dreaded Return Of Russell Buckins

Video.summary: Penhall and Hanson must bring a young private back to the Army base before he's charged with desertion.
Video.title: A.W.O.L.
